groupings.title: Product Lifecycle
groupings.description: Skills for planning complete products from market research through support, growth, and operations.

groupings.title: UI Design & Product Craft
groupings.description: Skills for modern, fast, subtle, mobile-first, responsive interfaces and resilient UI states.

groupings.title: Growth & Conversion
groupings.description: Skills for acquisition, positioning, SEO, landing pages, pricing pages, funnels, campaigns, and launch growth.

groupings.title: Pricing, Payments & Monetization
groupings.description: Skills for SaaS pricing, subscriptions, payments, purchases, entitlements, refunds, and revenue systems.

groupings.title: Mobile & Game Product Systems
groupings.description: Skills for mobile app monetization, retention, onboarding, notifications, game economies, IAP, IAA, and rewards.

groupings.title: Distribution, Platforms & Release Ops
groupings.description: Skills for store launch, OS integration, listings, launch readiness, backup, changelogs, and product operations.

groupings.title: Trust, Support & Analytics
groupings.description: Skills for support operations, help centers, privacy, abuse/fraud, incident communications, and analytics taxonomy.

groupings.title: Developer & Marketplace Products
groupings.description: Skills for developer tools, plugin stores, creator marketplaces, public directories, quality review, discovery, and marketplace operations.

groupings.title: Agent Skill Operations
groupings.description: Skills for creating, curating, validating, and operating reusable agent skills.
